summary: A standard for a contract to indicate which SEPs it claims to implement.

sections.title: SEP Declaration
sections.content: Features for declaring implemented SEPs in contract metadata

contract_meta_features.name: sep_meta_key
contract_meta_features.description: Support for "sep" meta entry key to indicate implemented SEPs

contract_meta_features.name: comma_separated_list
contract_meta_features.description: Parse comma-separated list of SEP numbers from meta value

contract_meta_features.name: multiple_sep_entries
contract_meta_features.description: Support for multiple "sep" meta entries with combined values

sections.title: Meta Entry Format
sections.content: Parsing and format handling for SEP meta entries

contract_meta_features.name: sep_number_format
contract_meta_features.description: Parse SEP numbers in various formats (e.g., "41", "0041", "SEP-41")

contract_meta_features.name: whitespace_handling
contract_meta_features.description: Trim whitespace from SEP numbers in comma-separated list

contract_meta_features.name: empty_value_handling
contract_meta_features.description: Handle empty or missing "sep" meta entries gracefully

sections.title: Implementation Support
sections.content: SDK support for parsing and exposing supported SEPs

contract_meta_features.name: parse_supported_seps
contract_meta_features.description: Parse and extract list of supported SEPs from contract metadata

contract_meta_features.name: expose_supported_seps
contract_meta_features.description: Expose supportedSeps property on contract info object

contract_meta_features.name: validate_sep_format
contract_meta_features.description: Validate SEP number format and filter invalid entries
